title: Single-celery soda
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Single-celery soda''' was a drink enjoyed by [[Ugor/Legends|Ugors]]. The chef [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[L9-G8]] instructed the rebel crew of the ''[[Bonderium]]'' to prepare this soda, in order to bribe [[ArrGack]] and [[GrrKack]] for admission to the [[Paradise system/Legends|Paradise system]].

{{Food-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]
